content.en:
"This is the bones of the Lord of the Bitter River Realm!"

Ye Tian stared at the bones of the Bitter River Realm Lord, under the erosion of countless years of tribulation, only bones remained, and many treasures on his body had also dissipated, but there were still some items left.

Among these treasures, Ye Tian found the inheritance of the Sanwu Secret Method and several other innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritances.

"I'm very lucky, I finally found the third layer inheritance of the Three Black Secret Method, and then I can continue to cultivate the Three Black Secret Method and improve the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies!"

Ye Tian put away these treasures and inheritances, and then left quickly.

Subsequently, he left the Celestial Spider Battlefield and took these things with him.

Return to the territory of four thousand five hundred.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method, but he did not reveal it to the Extinction Realm Lord.

He had already cultivated the second layer of the Three Black Secret Method to the limit of Dacheng, and now that it had taken some years to understand the content of the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method, he began to cultivate, and it was easy to cultivate the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method to the realm of the first entry.

Now.

Ye Tian found that he could easily control the power of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, the Wumu Body, and the Ten Dimensional Celestial Bodies.

"My black mother's body has been cultivated to the limit of the second layer of Dacheng, and now I can try to hit the third layer!"

Immediately, he began to attack the third layer of the black mother's body.

With the help of many resources, Ye Tian began to attack the third layer of the black mother's body.

Rumble!!!!

Impacting again and again, the strength of the bottleneck of the black mother's body was still extremely terrifying, but after Ye Tian tried many times, he finally broke the bottleneck, but it also consumed a lot of his resources.

Of course.

Ye Tian felt that his black mother's body could be broken so easily, or it had something to do with the soul will reaching the ninth dimension, otherwise even if he spent more resources, it would not be easy to break the bottleneck.

Soon after, Ye Tian's Jiaye wisdom body broke through to the third layer of Xiaocheng realm.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength has also skyrocketed.

"Very good, my current strength should be close to reaching the sixth day level combat power!" Ye Tian said with a sigh.

So on this day, Ye Tian tried to break through the sixth level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, but he almost broke through.

This shows that he is very close to the sixth day of the battle power.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian's main cultivation content was to improve his cultivation, comprehend the rules of the transcendent dimension, and create the ninth dimension of the will of the mastery, once he created the ninth dimension of the will of the mastery, his strength would definitely immediately enter the sixth day of the combat power, and in the sixth day of the battle power of the powerful category.

However, it is extremely difficult for the Ninth Dimension Will Peerless to create.

Even if he had already comprehended the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Technique, it would definitely be ten times or even more than a hundred times more difficult to create the Ninth Dimension Will.

Time flies.

Three thousand extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's ten-dimensional celestial body had finally reached the third layer realm, which had consumed countless resources, but it was still worth it.

In addition, Ye Tian also cultivated the Sanwu Secret Method to the third layer of the Xiaocheng realm.

And Ye Tian also raised his cultivation to the late stage of the fourth realm.

If he was on the side of the Fifth Dimensional Tribulation, he would not be able to improve his cultivation so quickly, but the Fourth Thousand Territory had a treasure of multi-dimensional tribulation liquid, which was refined by the fifth realm by using the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation plus some resources, and it was most suitable for improving the cultivation of the fourth realm, which was even better than the cultivation of the fourth realm.

Ye Tian had been buying this kind of multi-dimensional tribulation liquid, which was able to quickly improve his cultivation to the late stage of the fourth realm, but it would take a long time before he could reach the peak of the fourth realm.

And after such a long time, he finally created the Ninth Dimension Will Peerless Learning.

Ye Tian's ability to create the Ninth Dimension Will Peerless Technique has a lot to do with the Firmament Wooden Blade, he uses the Firmament Wooden Blade to transform the power of various multi-dimensional tribulations, and uses the Ninth Dimension Will to manipulate the power of these multidimensional tribulations, so as to research and create attack methods that can make full use of the Ninth Dimension's Soul Will.

After countless studies, he was able to figure it out.

The three powers of Wind Tribulation, Fire Tribulation, and Thunder Tribulation were fused by Ye Tian in an ingenious way, forming a terrifying blade light, which erupted from the soul will simulation.

He had tested it, and this move directly crossed the ninth dimension, directly hitting his other copy body from a long distance.

As a result, Ye Tian named this Ninth Dimensional Will Peerless Sect the Firmament Tribulation Blade.

After mastering the Celestial Tribulation Blade, the ninth dimension will mastery, in the fourth realm now, if the soul will does not reach the ninth dimension, he can easily kill it, and it is a thought to kill it in seconds.

This is the terrifying nature of the Ninth Dimension's Will Peerlessness.

this day.

Ye Tian re-entered the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, and he wanted to break through the Sixth Heaven Pass.

Level 6.

I saw that tens of thousands of extra-dimensional rules appeared on this gatekeeper, and a multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms of one door broke out, and even an eighth-dimensional will mastery broke out.

However, the other party's will was directly blocked by Ye Tian's Tower of Wind Tribulation.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian went all out, smashing the opponent's defense with the sand and gravel robbery, and then annihilated the opponent's soul will with a single blow from the ninth dimensional will of the Peerless Sky Tribulation Blade.

In this way, Ye Tian passed the sixth level so easily.

Then, he went to break through the seventh day level, but he recognized it in an instant.

The interlocutors of the seventh level are too terrifying, they have comprehended at least 20,000 extra-dimensional rules, and they have also comprehended the will of the ninth dimension, and they have also practiced three innate multi-dimensional dao bodies, crushing Ye Tian in all aspects.

This is only the gatekeeper of the seventh level, but you can imagine how terrible the gatekeeper of the eighth level and the gatekeeper of the ninth level are.

Subsequently.

He left with the imprint of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Sword, and after he returned, he continued to observe the supreme discipline of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Sword.

That knife still makes Ye Tian difficult to imagine its level, but every time (yes) perception has a huge gain.

Now that he has passed the sixth level, the time to attain enlightenment has naturally been extended a lot.

A hundred extradimensional epochs, this is the time when he can now comprehend.

As a result, he has been here to comprehend the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Sword.

"If only I could create a supreme mastery, even if it is a supreme mastery of the Three Realms, it would be possible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, if you want to comprehend the supreme mastery, such as trying to perfectly combine the soul will mastery with the multi-dimensional mastery, it will be difficult for Ye Tian to comprehend the mystery from beginning to end, this is the bottleneck, if you can't break this bottleneck, it will be difficult to create it.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred extradimensional epochs passed, and the ten-dimensional Heavenly Sword imprint dissipated.

And he still didn't have much to gain.

He can only hope to pass the seventh and eighth levels in the future, and then get more time to comprehend, and try again.
